blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
